claim_labels: D1 THEOREM; D2 EVIDENCE; conj:pencil remains OPEN

interpretation_guard.comparison_distribution: raw integer intersections |L intersect L'| = 2^{dim cap}; common normalisation cancels in ratios
interpretation_guard.m_vs_n_scaling: conj:pencil scale is |D'| >= |Lagr(2n)|/2^{2n-c}; checked at the c-scale threshold T_n = |Lagr|/2^{2n}
interpretation_guard.noise_rate: not applicable -- this is a structural geometric statistic, not an output-noise-rate comparison

n2.verdict: THEOREM: n=2 max average correlation <= 5*rho_avg for every subset size

n3.verdict: EVIDENCE: no search found a subset at scale beating 5*rho_avg
